title: Endolyne Park - Parks | seattle.gov
content: # Endolyne Park. 9827 49th Ave. SW, Seattle, WA 98116. Phone: (206) 684-4075 684-4075). Presumably named after the Endolyne plat in which it is situated, "Endolyne" is purported to be a nickname of the Fauntleroy neighborhood, for its once being the end of  the trolley line. This park is a greenspace. ## Parks and Recreation. Mailing Address: 100 Dexter Ave N, Seattle, WA, 98109. Fax: (206) 615-1813 615-1813). Email: pks\_info@seattle.gov.
